doc.purpose: Azahar seeded qt-config.ini content (the Deck-proven golden) as data, substituted by AzaharEmitter: storage routed into the launcher's data root, the renderer pinned to the overlay graphics api, and the first-run/confirmation dialogs silenced so launches are unattended. Variables: ${emulator_name} / ${configuration_file} place the profile from the contract, ${azahar_root} is the launcher-routed data home computed from outputRoot, ${renderer_key} / ${renderer_value} come from the graphics contract's values table.
doc.grammar: Qt ini wire format: 'key=value' plus the 'key\default=' marker Qt uses to remember whether the value matches its built-in default.
